contents.text: Abilities are a core component of a character's kit and identity. They serve as cooldown-based actions that cover a wide range of functions.
Abilities can include, but are not limited to: Thrown projectiles, Movement options, Beam attacks, Healing pulses, and Self buffs, just to name a few.
Abilities are activated by using the ability's item in your hotbar. Text appears in the description of each ability with a brief note on how to use the ability.
Once an ability is used, it is either consumed or will go on cooldown. Cooldowns appear above your hotbar with a number that displays how many seconds until your ability is ready to use.
